name: Feast of the Beast
short_description: Explore Mars and a post-apocalyptic Earth in a world ravaged by an alien pathogen that turns people into zombies. The TOX-Z toxin generates unlimited energy, unleashing a battle for power. Survive relentless hordes and uncover the truth in a story of betrayal and ambition.
detailed_description:
About This Game

Dive into an open-world action and survival game that will take you from the arid lands of Mars to an Earth ravaged by an uncontrollable infection. It all began with the discovery of an alien pathogen on Mars, capable of generating the TOX-Z toxin, a chemical that, when mixed with certain minerals, produces more energy than nuclear power.

But power comes at a price. In their ambition to control this source of unlimited energy, governments allowed the pathogen to infect the population, turning people into zombies thirsty for destruction. Now, the world is plunged into chaos, and the fight is not just for survival but for control of the most powerful and dangerous resource ever known.


KEY FEATURES

Interplanetary and Post-Apocalyptic Exploration: Travel between Mars and a ruined Earth, uncovering devastated landscapes and hidden secrets about the origin of TOX-Z. From abandoned Martian bases to collapsed cities, each setting offers unique challenges and relentless enemies.

Fight for Absolute Power: Face hordes of zombies spawned by TOX-Z and human factions seeking to control the unlimited energy. Use a customizable arsenal of weapons and special abilities to survive in a world where the line between life and death is blurred.

Story of Betrayal and Power: Immerse yourself in a complex narrative filled with conspiracies, betrayals, and sacrifices. Discover how the greed for controlling TOX-Z drove humanity to the brink of extinction and decide the world's fate.
